arts.ttl: Immediate Reaction: Real Madrid 6-0 Levante; Liga F
arts.sum: No more Angeldahl gravitating toward the wide areas since Athenea took the left-wing spot and Navarro went to the right wing. Despite having two wingers on the pitch, Angeldahl served as the left winger working with Olga when going wide and with Teresa when starting the action from behind.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid predicted lineup vs Mallorca - Supercopa de Espana
arts.sum: Predicting how Real Madrid could line up for their Supercopa de Espana semi-final against Mallorca on Thursday night.

arts.ttl: Ancelotti makes his feelings clear on Real Madrid playing in Saudi Arabia
arts.sum: Real Madrid manager Carlo Ancelotti sat down in front of the press ahead of the game against Mallorca in the Spanish Super Cup, which is set to be played in Saudi Arabia . The Italian was asked about a multitude of things, including the fitness of returning defender David Alaba, Vinicius Jr’s behaviour and the reaction to it, and the decision to continue to play the Spanish tournament in another continent, over 6,000 km away.

arts.ttl: Team News: Real Madrid vs. Mallorca injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Thursday's Supercopa de Espana clash between Real Madrid and Mallorca.

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold is DROPPED by Liverpool for Carabao Cup semi-final at Tottenham after Man United horror show as Real Madrid try to sign him
arts.sum: The England right-back, who has been left out for 21-year-old starlet Conor Bradley, put in one of his worst performances in a Liverpool shirt on Sunday as his side drew 2-2 with bitter rivals Man United.

arts.ttl: ‘It’s not right’ – Real Madrid boss Ancelotti responds to Vinícius Jr’s La Liga ban
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has confirmed that the club have been left disappointed by the extent of the suspension handed down to star winger Vinícius Jr. This of…

arts.ttl: Starting Lineups: Real Madrid vs. UD Levante; Liga F 2024-25
arts.sum: Real Madrid XI: Misa, Antonia, Maria Mendez, Maelle Lakrar, Olga; Teresa, Leupolz; Angeldahl, Redondo, Athenea; Feller Former Levante players, Antonia, Maria Mendez and Alba Redondo all start in this game.

arts.ttl: The Future of La Fabrica: Will Real Madrid’s Youth Players Shine or Fade?
arts.sum: Setting aside that argument for a moment, if we accept the premise that the comparison to Torres is true, it would mean Asencio is a valuable, serviceable player for 2–3 seasons. The recent influx of Real Madrid youth talent being integrated into the first team has become a surprising storyline of Ancelotti 4.0.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid-Celta in the Copa del Rey round of 16
arts.sum: Real Madrid will take on RC Celta in the last 16 of the Copa del Rey following the draw held at the headquarters of the Royal Spanish Football Federation. Copa del Rey Round of 16 clashes:
